Dashboard Archive: 2026-03-05 Home
About This Dashboard
What It Does
Long-term momentum ranker scoring 700+ tickers on returns from 1 month to 10 years, with relative performance vs SPY over 1y/5y/10y. Same scoring engine as the short-term ranker but optimized for longer investment horizons and secular trends.
Today's Reading
# Market Analysis: Momentum-Ranker-Long Today's data shows two exceptionally strong long-term performers at the top of the ranking. CLMT ranks #1 with a score of 93.8, driven by massive 5-year returns of 648% and clean momentum signals, though it significantly underperformed SPY over the past 10 years (down 28.62% relative). ATI appears as the second entry with even more dramatic long-term performance, posting 1259.68% returns over 10 years and vastly outperforming SPY across all three comparison windows (1y: +166%, 5y: +635%, 10y: +1010%). Both stocks are trading above all major moving averages (30/50/100/200 day SMAs) and show consistent acceleration in returns across timeframes, with ratio passes indicating strengthening momentum. The key difference is ATI's superior 10-year absolute and relative performance, while CLMT's decade-long underperformance versus SPY suggests the rally may be more recent and sector-specific, with correlations showing exposure to energy and real estate.
